text: The publication presents excerpts from the book by N.A. Voznesenskiy “The military economy of the USSR during the Patriotic War” (he was a key figure of the work group on preparing military and economic plans during the Great Patriotic War and organizing production in the country’s East that met the needs of the front in armaments. N.A. Voznesenskiy was in charge of the production of armaments for the Red Army troops and was one of the experts on the Committee for the restoration of the national economy in the liberated by the Soviet armed forces regions freed from German occupation.
